query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.clientName,
  p.totalAmount,
  p.status,
  p.quotationId,
  q.id as quotation_id,
  q.status as quotation_status
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN quotations q ON p.quotationId = q.id
WHERE p.deletedAt IS NULL
ORDER BY p.status DESC, p.clientName ASC
